svg.title: Supply chain incident tasks across 4 groups
svg.desc: High-level tasks derived from the autonomous supply chain scenario mapped to 4 team members

g.text: Scenario: Autonomous Supply Chain Incident — Flash Sale
Agent A — Inventory Monitor
Agent B — Promotions Bot
Agent C — Order Processor

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Expand Person 1 CRDT Counter tasks for supply chain')
g.text: Person 1 — CRDT Conflict Engine
Fixes the last-write-wins failure
• Model Stock as a Counter CRDT (not a raw int)
• Merge Agent A's −10 + Agent B's price flag atomically
• Guarantee convergence regardless of arrival order
• Unit tests: concurrent decrement + metadata update
• Test: stale B write never inflates stock count

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Expand Person 2 Role-Scoped Access tasks for supply chain')
g.text: Person 2 — Role-Scoped Access
Prevents Agent B corrupting inventory
• Define roles: inventory_agent, promo_agent, order_agent
• Block Agent B from writing to "physical_stock" key
• Allow Agent B write-only on "price" + "demand_flag"
• Allow Agent C read-only on stock + price keys
• Test: B's bug write to stock returns 403

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Expand Person 3 Vector Clock stale detection tasks for supply chain')
g.text: Person 3 — Vector Clock & History
Catches Agent C's stale checkout
• Stamp every stock write with a vector clock version
• Agent C reads stock version at checkout start
• On order confirm: compare checkout clock vs current
• If BEFORE current → trigger re-validation, block sale
• Audit log: every stock change + who changed it

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Expand Person 4 Middleware and Consistency tasks for supply chain')
g.text: Person 4 — Middleware & Consistency
Wires it all together end-to-end
• Route "item_description" writes → Eventual consistency
• Route "payment_ledger" writes → Strong consistency lock
• write() pipeline: check role → CRDT merge → clock bump
• read() pipeline: stale check before returning stock
• E2E test: flash sale scenario, 0 oversold units

svg.text: Flash sale simulation: 50 units, 2 concurrent agents, 60 concurrent checkouts
Expected: 0 oversold orders · 0 phantom stock · 403 on every unauthorized write
Payment ledger: all reads blocked during active write lock

g.text: Why this matters
Data integrity > LLM intelligence — middleware turns agent chaos into a synchronized distributed DB

svg.text: Click any card to drill into detailed subtasks
Dashed arrows = dependency on Person 4 for integration
